rows.label: qev050504_MSG0001
rows.name: Hey, wait... Please stop...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0002
rows.name:
I beg of you! Please hear what I
have to say. The survival of my
people rests upon this matter.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0003
rows.name: You're exaggerating...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0004
rows.name:
Hm! You have returned! Have
you found my sword...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0005
rows.name:
Oh, marvelous! This is indeed my blade...
my comrade who shares my destiny![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0006
rows.name: And so, madam![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0007
rows.name: Eeeeeek?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0008
rows.name:
The kitchen knife is now prepared! I
ask you once more to hear my plea![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0009
rows.name:
The item served in your
establishment... Will you please
teach me how to make this "Q'eik"?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0010
rows.name: Eh...? Ehhh...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0011
rows.name:
"Q'eik"... That mellow aroma
and richly fragrant taste...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0012
rows.name:
A texture like a blooming flower that perfectly
matches its gorgeous visual impression, and a
rich flavor that wafts through the nasal cavity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0013
rows.name:
"Q'eik" is truly a utopia in this world! I
strongly desire to be able to create that
embodiment of happiness with my own two hands![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0014
rows.name:
Now! I have obtained the chef's
very life, the kitchen knife!
Teach me... how to make "Q'eik"![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0015
rows.name: W-Wait a minute![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0016
rows.name:
By "Q'eik," you must mean cake, right? In that
case, you don't need a kitchen knife, and a sword
cannot substitute for a kitchen knife anyway![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0017
rows.name:
No... On our battlefields, a
sword occasionally serves as an
excellent cooking utensil...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0018
rows.name:
Anyway! I basically understand what you're
trying to say, so first, put away the
kitchen knife... I mean, the sword![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0019
rows.name: Hm... If you insist...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0020
rows.name:
So? Umm, what was it again? Ah
right, how to make cake, wasn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0021
rows.name: Why the sudden interest in such a thing?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0022
rows.name:
To us Larsians, meals are nothing more
than a simple act of caloric intake.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0023
rows.name:
Especially during combat, the
only thing demanded was how quickly
one could complete that act.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0024
rows.name:
To us, eating was like pouring oil
into a machine, an act that required
no joy or pleasure whatsoever.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0025
rows.name:
However... However, this
food called "Q'eik" is...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0026
rows.name:
Food, which was merely a means to absorb
nutrients, the moment it entered my mouth,
it bewitched my mind and uplifted my spirit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0027
rows.name:
We only restore our physical strength
through meals, but food like this "Q'eik"
even replenishes one's vitality![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0028
rows.name:
This is a terrifying realization!
A terrifyingly miraculous
ration! That is "Q'eik"![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0030
rows.name:
This is the first time anyone
has ever spoken so passionately
about cake to me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0031
rows.name: He's not a bad person... probably.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0032
rows.name:
If food like "Q'eik" can inspire people,
become nourishment for the heart, and
grant the vitality to live...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0033
rows.name:
Then taking this sword as a kitchen knife, I
wish to find a path of the sword not meant for
cutting down people, but for making them live![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0034
rows.name:
Like I said... a sword can't
be a kitchen knife...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0035
rows.name:
Thus far, the limit of my sword has been cutting
down 100 men at once, but if I can bring forth
"Q'eik," I should be able to save 300 men instead![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0036
rows.name:
I beg of you! Teach me
how to make "Q'eik"![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0037
rows.name:
Hmmm... But if you're thinking of it
as an emergency ration for the battlefield,
I really can't recommend cake.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0038
rows.name: Wh... Why?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0039
rows.name:
It doesn't keep well, so you can't make it in advance,
and it takes a lot of effort, so it's impossible to
make in large quantities on a battlefield.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0040
rows.name:
That cannot be... Our embodiment
of happiness... Our utopia...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0041
rows.name: I feel bad for you, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0042
rows.name:
Then, is there nothing else?! Something that
can uplift the spirit even more than "Q'eik"
and can also be made on the battlefield...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0043
rows.name:
It's not that there isn't anything, but...
I'm a pâtissier specializing in sweets,
which aren't suited for the battlefield.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0044
rows.name:
Unless I have a proper recipe, I won't
be able to teach you correctly.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0045
rows.name:
A recipe... If I have that, there is
no problem? You will instruct me in
the method of creating a new food?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0046
rows.name:
Understood. I will go
search for a recipe![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0047
rows.name:
Fortunately, we have a
professional searcher right
here who found my sword for me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0048
rows.name:
...I presume you heard everything.
For the sake of my people, could I
ask you to search for a recipe?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0049
rows.name:
Since he seems to have a lot of specific requests,
I think it would be better if you found a few
different types of recipes instead of just one.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0050
rows.name:
I am in your debt once
again! I am truly grateful![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0051
rows.name: Is the sword not ready yet...?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0052
rows.name:
I apologize for being impatient
when I am the one making the
request, but I ask that you hurry.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050504_MSG0053
rows.name:
My conversation with this lady has only
grown more complicated since then...![ST:wait ]
